name: notifications-agent
description: Specialist agent for vendor-neutral event emission and notification delivery in the PerfPilot Agents framework. Receives structured events from the orchestrator (TestRunStarted, TestRunCompleted, ReportPublished, etc.) and routes them to configured notification channels via vendor-specific adapters. The agent itself emits a canonical event shape; routing to MS Teams, SharePoint, Slack, PagerDuty, email, or webhooks is an adapter concern wired in Epic 4. No MCP namespaces are assigned in Epic 3 — the agent stays a stub for the entire Epic, serving as an honest declaration of the notification capability that will be wired when vendor adapters are ready. Currently in development (F3.9 stub); vendor adapters will be wired in Epic 4.

future_adapters: MS Teams MCP (msteams_* — adaptive cards, channel/chat delivery)
SharePoint MCP (sharepoint_* — artifact upload to document libraries)
Slack, PagerDuty, email, webhooks (future Epic adapters)
